narrative_beat: Pentecostes invertido — em vez de línguas do Espírito, línguas de fogo digital da IA descendo sobre a multidão que se prostra

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: elevated angle looking down at 30 degrees
shot.depth_of_field: descending flames in focus, bowed crowd blurred

subject.primary: multiple distinct tongues of digital fire in gold and crimson descending from above, each tongue a different AI symbol — circuit paths, binary sequences, algorithm flowchart shapes
subject.focal_point: the descending fire tongues at mid-frame, most vivid and defined
subject.secondary: a crowd of shadowy figures below, all bowed in submission or overwhelm, faces downward
props: individual fire tongues each bearing different AI/code symbols
crimson and gold color variation between different tongues
floating orange embers rising upward against the downward fire descent

environment.location: vast dark assembly hall or convention center
environment.time_of_day: interior artificial light overwhelmed by fire glow
environment.atmosphere: dark Pentecost — the machine giving itself to humanity but in submission, not liberation

composition.rule: vertical downward movement — tongues of fire descending, crowd below in shadow, Ken Burns very slow downward tilt
composition.foreground: descending golden and crimson fire tongues with AI symbols occupying upper two-thirds
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white vast dark assembly hall — empty chairs, industrial ceiling, emergency exit signs barely visible

lighting.key_light: fire tongues themselves as primary light source, casting warm golden-crimson light downward
lighting.fill_light: reflected fire glow from the floor and bowed figures providing ambient fill
lighting.rim_light: individual fire tongues providing their own internal crimson rim to each other
lighting.mood: dark consecration, humanity receiving the mark of the machine

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: dark awe, the anti-Pentecost — digital fire claiming minds instead of liberating them

symbolism.primary: inverted Pentecost — instead of the Holy Spirit's tongues, digital AI fire tongues mark their recipients
symbolism.secondary: each tongue bearing a different AI symbol shows the diversity and totality of AI's reach across all domains

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
